name: bob-control
description: BOB Control — remote Android phone control via a cloud relay.

interface.shortDescription: Remote Android phone control via your phone
interface.longDescription: Control your Android phone through the BOB Control app over a cloud relay — capture screenshots, read the on-screen UI tree, tap, swipe, type, and manage apps and notifications. Runs entirely on your device; commands are relayed to the phone, not executed server-side.
defaultPrompt: Take a screenshot of my phone and tell me what's on screen
